payload.label: stove
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a black glossy stovetop control panel approximately 0.6 m from the camera, showing three stainless steel round knobs on a reflective metal strip with a beige countertop visible along the bottom; the object is edge-cropped horizontally and shows strong reflections on the surface.
